sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, and GRA source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote: <L>1927<pc>9,2<k1>aj<k2>aj<e>1 <s>aj</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>P.</ab> (<ab>defect.</ab>, supplemented <ab>fr.</ab> √ <s>vI</s>), <s>a/jati</s>, <s>AjIt</s>, <s>ajitum</s>, to drive, propel, throw, cast: <div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>ajijizati</s>, to be desirous of driving <info whitneyroots="aj,2"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="1P"/> <LEND>

<L>871<pc>1-0065<k1>aj<k2>aj
{#aj#}¦, {#a/jati#}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 7,55.</ls> (<ab>med.</ab> kommt gleichfalls vor). Nach
<ls>P. 2,4,56.</ls> <ls n="P. 2,4,">57.</ls> fehlen die generellen Formen;
<ls>SIDDH. K. 115,a.</ls> dagegen bildet: {#AjiTa, ajitA, ajizyati, AjIt#} (<ab>vgl.</ab>
<ls>VOP. 8,60.</ls>), {#Ajizyat#} . Der Palatal geht nie in den Guttural über
<ls>P. 7,3,60.</ls>
<div n="1"> 1) {%gehen%}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 7,55.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 8,58.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%treiben%},
<lang n="greek">ἄγω</lang>, {%ago%}: {#aja^nti\ vahni\M sada^nA\nyacCa^#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,91,1.</ls> {#a\smadA ni\do va\DEra^jeta durma\tim#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,129,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">174,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">7,5,6.</ls> <ls>AV. 4,37,2.</ls> — {#Ajimaj#} {%einen Wettlauf anstellen%}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 2,4,3,4.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">5,1,1,3.</ls> <ab>pass.</ab>: {#kratvA\ hi droRe^ a\jyase 'gne^ vA\jI na kftvya^H#}
<ls>ṚV. 6,2,8</ls>, {#a\jyamAna^H#} vom Pferde
<ls n="ṚV.">5,30,14.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%schwingen, schleudern%}
<ls>DHĀTUP.</ls> <ls>VOP.</ls> {#yABi\H SArI\rAja^ta\M syUma^raSmaye#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,112,16.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#apa#} {%wegtreiben%}: {#apa\ tyaM pa^ripa\nTina^maja#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,42,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,3,1.</ls>
<ls>AIT. BR. 5,28.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#aBi#} {%in Verbindung bringen, vereinigen%}: {#yatsa\myaYcA^ miTu\nAva\ByajA^va#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,179,3.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ava#} {%hinabtreiben, hinabschaffen%}: {#Sro\RAmeka^ uda\kaM gAmavA^jati#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,161,10.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#A#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%herbeitreiben, verschaffen%}: {#AjA^ na\zwaM yaTA^ pa\Sum#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,23,13.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">83,5.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">5,2,5.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">8,45,3.</ls>
<ls>VS. 23,19.</ls>
<ls>AIT. BR. 1,27.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#A De\numa^jaDvam#}
<ls>ṚV. 6,48,11.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%herbeitreiben%} (<ab>intrans.</ab>), {%fahrend herbeikommen%}: {#A sa^tva\nEraja^ti#}
<ls>ṚV. 5,37,4.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#aByA#} {%herantreiben%}: {#gAmaByAja SuklAm#}
<ls>P. 8,1,8</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="p">— {#ud#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%heraustreiben%}: {#gA udA^jat#}
<ls>ṚV. 2,12,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 2,">14,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 2,">24,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">4,1,13.</ls>
<ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 3,1,1.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#u\sriyA^ u\dAja^ta#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,112,12.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">3,44,5.</ls> {#sa etA gA udajatAm#}
<ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 3,1,1.</ls> {#brahmagavIrudajase#}
<ls n="BṚH. ĀR. UP.">3,7,1.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%ausziehen%}, <ab>med.</ab>: {#ucCu\kramatka^majate si\masmA^t#} {%er zieht jeglichem Ding das glänzende Gewand (Ansehen) aus%}
<ls>ṚV. 1,95,7.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#upa#} {%herantreiben%}: {#a\gnire^nA u\pAja^tu#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,19,2.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#bfha\spati^rvi\SvarU^pA\mupAjata#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,161,6.</ls> {#pfSni^me\tAmupA^je#}
<ls>AV. 5,11,2.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#nis#} {%austreiben, herausbringen%}: {#nirvo^ go\zWAda^jAmasi#}
<ls>AV. 2,14,2.</ls> {#niH parva^tasya\ gA A^jaH#}
<ls>ṚV. 8,3,19.</ls> {#ni\raje\#} (<ab>dat.</ab> <ab>inf.</ab>) {#gAH#}
<ls n="ṚV.">3,30,10.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#vi#} {%auseinandertreiben, durchfurchen%}: {#vi yadajrA\~ aja^Ta\ nAva^ IM yaTA#}
<ls>ṚV. 5,54,4.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#sam#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%zusammentreiben, gewinnen%}: {#kzAme^va na\H sama^jata\M rajA^Msi#}
<ls>ṚV. 2,39,7.</ls>
[Page1-0066]
{#sama^jAti\ veda^H#}
<ls n="ṚV.">5,2,12.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 5,">34,7.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">1,33,3.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%zusammentreiben, zu Paaren treiben%}: {#spfDa\H sama^jA sa\matsu^#}
<ls>ṚV. 6,25,9.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%feindlich zusammenbringen%}: {#saM jA\miBi\ryatsa\majA^ti mI\|e 'jA^miBirvA#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,100,11.</ls> {#yatsa\majA^si\ SarDa^taH#}
<ls n="ṚV.">7,32,7.</ls>
<LEND>

<L>1208<pc>1-014-c<k1>aj<k2>aj √{#aj#}¦ {#a/jati#} und {#ajate#} (selten) <div n="1">— 1〉 {%treiben, antreiben; wegtreiben%}. — {#Aji/m#} {%einen Wettlauf anstellen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%schleudern%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ati#} {%hinübertreiben%} <ls>LĀṬY. 3,6,2</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#apa#} {%wegtreiben%} <ls n="Chr.">1,12</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%hintreiben%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%vereinigen, verbinden%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ava#} {%herabtreiben%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#A#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%herbeitreiben%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 [Page1-015-a] {%fahrend herbeikommen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aByA#} {%herantreiben%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%heraustreiben%} <ls n="Chr.">3,17</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%herausholen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#upa#} {%herantreiben%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#nis#} {%heraustreiben%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pra#} {%antreiben%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%vertreiben%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%durchfurchen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%zusammentreiben%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%feindlich zusammenbringen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%zu Paaren treiben%}. <LEND>

<L>351<pc>0023-a<k1>aj<k2>aj {#aj#}¦ {c1c} <ab>P.</ab> (optionally replaced by the root {#vI#} in non-conjugational tenses; {#ajati, AjIt, ajituM#}) {@1@} To go. {@--2@} To drive, lead. {@--3@} To throw, cast (used with prepositions found only in Vedic literature). [<ab>cf.</ab> <ab>L.</ab> {%ago%}; <ab>Gr.</ab> {%ago%}; Zend {%az%}]. <LEND>

<L>169<pc>0018<k1>aj<k2>aj {@√aj@}¦ [<ls>Cu. 〔117〕</ls>], 1〉 Rosse [<ab>A.</ab>] {%treiben,%} auch bildlich den Soma oder Agni, namentlich 2〉 sie wohin [<ab>L.</ab>, ácha <ab n="mit">m.</ab> <ab>Acc.</ab>] {%treiben;%} 3〉 Wagen [<ab>A.</ab>] {%treiben, vorwärts bewegen;%} 4〉 Pfeile [<ab>A.</ab>] {%treiben, schleudern;%} 5〉 {%wegtreiben%} [<ab>A.</ab>] von [<ab>Ab.</ab> (<ab n="mit">m.</ab> ā́)]; 6〉 {%antreiben%} [<ab>A.</ab>]. <div n="Pf">Mit {@ápa@} 1〉 wegtreiben [<ab>A.</ab>] von [<ab>Ab.</ab>]; 2〉 auch ohne <ab>Abl.</ab> <div n="Pf">{@abhí,@} {%vereinigen, verbinden%} (<ab>eigentl.</ab> einander zutreiben). <div n="Pf">{@áva,@} {%herabtreiben%} [<ab>A.</ab>] zu [<ab>A.</ab>]. <div n="Pf">{@ā́@} 1〉 {%herbeitreiben,%} Vieh, [<ab>A.</ab>], 2〉 Feinde {%herbeitreiben%} (um sie zu tödten). <div n="Pf">{@úd,@} {%heraustreiben,%} Vieh [<ab>A.</ab>], 2〉 {%herausholen%} [<ab>A.</ab>] aus [<ab>Ab.</ab>]. <div n="Pf">{@úpa,@} {%herbeitreiben,%} Kühe [<ab>A.</ab>]. <div n="Pf">{@nís,@} Kühe [<ab>A.</ab>] {%heraustreiben%}. <div n="Pf">{@ví@} 1〉 {%vertreiben%} [<ab>A.</ab>]; 2〉 Gefilde, Meer <ab>u. s. w.</ab> [<ab>A.</ab>] {%durchfurchen%}. <div n="Pf">{@sám@} 1〉 {%zusammentreiben%} [<ab>A.</ab>], 2〉 {%gegeneinandertreiben%} [<ab>A.</ab>], 3〉 des Feindes Vieh oder Gut [<ab>A.</ab>] {%zusammentreiben,%} um es fortzuführen; 4〉 die Feinde [<ab>A.</ab>] {%zu Paaren treiben%}. <div n="H">Stamm {@ája:@} <div n="TS">-ati 3〉 yám (yā́mam) {507,7}. — ā́ 2〉 vṛtrám {391,4} (neben hánti). <div n="TS">-atha {@ví@} 2〉 rájāṃsi, ájrān {408,4} (nā́vas yathā). <div n="TS">-anti 2〉 váhnim sádanāni ácha {803,1}. <div n="TS">-āsi {@sam@} 4〉 śárdhatas {548,7}. <div n="TS">-āti {@sam@} 2〉 mīḍhé {100,11}. <div n="TS">-āva {@abhí@} samyáñcā mithunaú {179,3}. <div n="TS">-a [-ā] 6〉 vṛ́tas śū́rapatnīs {174,3}. <div n="H">{@aja:@} <div n="TS">-ati {@áva@} śronā́m gā́m udakám {161,10}. — ā́ 2〉 vṛ́tam {665,3}; {@sám@} 3〉 aryás gā́s {33,3}; panés bhójanam {388,7}. <div n="TS">-āti {@ā́@} 1〉 paśvás {356,5} (úpa nas); 2〉 aryás védas {356,12}. <div n="TS">-a [-ā] {@ápa@} 2〉 paripanthínam {42,3}. — ā́ 1〉 naṣṭám yáthā paśúm {23,13}. — 2〉 amū́s [Page19] {488,31} — {@sám@} 4〉 nas spṛ́dhas {466,9}. <div n="TS">-atu ā́ 1〉 púnar nas naṣṭám {495,10}. — {@upā́@} púnar enās {845,2}. <div n="TS">-atam {@sám@} 1〉 nas rájāṃsi {230,7}. <div n="TS">-e [<per>1.</per> <ab>s.</ab> <ab>med.</ab>] {@nís@} yūthā́ni gávām {624,20}. <div n="TS">-ate {@úd@} 2〉 átkam simásmāt {95,7}. <div n="TS">-adhvam ā́, úpa 1〉 dhenúm {489,11}. <div n="TS">-eta 5〉 asmát ā́ nidás {129,6}. <div n="H"><ab>Imperf.</ab> {@ā́ja:@} <div n="TS">-at {@ud@} 1〉 gā́s {203,3}; {205,3}; {215,14}. <div n="TS">-atam 4〉 śā́rīs {112,16}. <div n="TS">-an {@ud@} 1〉 gomáyam vásu {888,2}. <div n="TS">-ata [<per>3.</per> <ab>s.</ab> <ab>med.</ab>] {@ud@} 1〉 usríyās {112,12}. <div n="H">{@āja:@} <div n="TS">-as 5〉 dásyūn ókasas {521,6}. — {@úd@} 1〉 usrā́s {964,2}. — {@nís@} gā́s {623,19}. <div n="TS">-at {@ápa@} támas antárikṣāt (udnás śī́pālam iva vā́tas) {894,5}. — ā́ 1〉 gā́s {83,5}. — {@úd@} 1〉 gā́s {215,3}; {634,8}; usríyās {346,5}; {894,7}. <div n="TS">-an {@úd@} 1〉 usrā́s {297,13}. <div n="TS">-ata [<per>3.</per> <ab>s.</ab> <ab>med.</ab>] {@úpa@} viśvárūpām {161,6}. — {@úd@} 1〉 gā́s {278,5}. <div n="H">Perfect (?) {@aj:@} <div n="TS">-jus-yamus 1〉 evā́ agním ajuryamus {360,10} (wo ajuryamus Zusammenrückung aus ajus und yamus zu sein scheint; <ab n="siehe">s.</ab> yam). <div n="H">Stamm <ab n="des">d.</ab> <ab>Pass.</ab> {@ajyá@} [<ab>vgl.</ab> añj]: <div n="TS">-áse 2〉 dróṇe ná vājī́ {443,8}. <div n="TS">-ate 1〉 índus {788,2}; {817,2} (oder zu añj). — {@ví@} 1〉 āsaktís {911,28}. <div n="H"><ab>Part.</ab> {@ájat:@} <div n="TS">-an {@apa@} 2〉 ásiknīm {829,1}. <div n="H"><ab>Part.</ab> <ab>Pass.</ab> {@ajyámāna:@} <div n="TS">-as 1〉 átyas ná vājī́ {384,14}. <div n="H">Verbale {@áj,@} als <ab>Infin.</ab> <div n="TS">-je {@nis@} [niráje] gā́s {264,10}. <div n="P">Ausserdem in pṛtanā́j = pṛtanā-áj. <LEND>
